name: TOP_ORIGIN_BY_GROWTH_3Y
description: Top origin by growth last 3 years. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (ymax:Year)
WITH max(ymax.year) AS max_year
MATCH (o:Origin {name: $origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= max_year - 3 + 1
RETURN y.year AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY year ASC

examples: How have patent filings from organizations or individuals in EU grown over the last three years?
How have patent filings from organizations or individuals in Other grown over the last three years?
How have patent filings from organizations or individuals in JP grown over the last three years?
